facets.name: absorbs
data: game.html — mountWaveEvents (line 187+), mountSpawnSystem (line 498). Substrate version: one singleton wave-spawner Thinga driven by its facet handler. Reads alive enemy count via byKind('enemy'); when zero, queues the next wave from tuning.

data.comment: Singleton today. Future variants: arena-wave (fixed sequence), survival-wave (random difficulty curve), boss-wave (single boss every Nth wave).
